versions.version_description: Simplified and more easy to read for piano players.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
John Legend ~ "Ordinary People"

Tabbed by: Law&GuitarGuy

A lot of these chords are very similar (e.g., Bbmaj7 and Bbmaj9),
you'll probably notice a distinctly more exact sound when you 
play them where I've indicated.


Bbmaj7:  x13231
Bbmaj9:  x10211
Bb6/9:   x10011
Bbm7:    x13121
Db/Eb:   xx1121
Ebmaj7:  xx1333
Ebmaj9:  xx1331
Fmaj7:   1x2210
Fmaj9:   xx3553
Fmaj13:  1x0210
Fadd2:   xx3213


[Intro]

[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb6/9[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Bb6/9[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]            [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Girl I'm in love with you, but this ain't the honey moon.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Fadd2[/ch]
We're past the infatuation phase.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                           [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
We're right in the thick of love.  At times we get sick of love.[/tab]
[tab]                           [ch]Fmaj13[/ch]
It seems like we argue every day.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 1]

[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
I know I've misbehaved and you've made your mistakes[/tab]
[tab]                                      [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
and we've both still got room left to grow.[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
And though love sometimes hurts, I still put you first.[/tab]
[tab]                                     [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
And we'll make this thing work but I think we should take it slow.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We're just ordinary people.  We don't know which way to go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
'cause we're ordinary people, maybe we should take it slow.[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj13[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
This ain't a movie, naw.  No fairy tale conclusion, y'all.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
It gets more confusing every day.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                           [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Oh, sometimes it's heaven sent, then we head back to hell again.[/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We kiss then we make up on the way.[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus 2]

[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                    [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
I hang up, you call.  We rise and we fall,[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
and we feel like just walking away.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
But as our love advances, we take second chances.[/tab]
[tab]                            [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Though it's not a fantasy, I still want you to stay.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We're just ordinary people.  We don't know which way to go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
'cause we're ordinary people, maybe we should take it slow.[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]         [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Maybe we'll live and learn.  Maybe we'll crash and burn.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Maybe you'll stay; maybe you'll leave; maybe you'll return.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                 [ch]Db/Eb[/ch]
Maybe another fight; maybe we won't survive;[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
But maybe we'll grow.  We never know, baby, you and I.[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Bbmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                          [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
We're just ordinary people.  We don't know which way to go.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]             [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                   [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
'cause we're ordinary people, maybe we should take it slow.[/tab]

[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Fmaj9[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]

[tab]      [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Ebmaj9[/ch]                 [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]
Take it slow, slow.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bbmaj7[/ch]    [ch]Ebmaj7[/ch]                       [ch]Fmaj13[/ch]
Take it slow, oh oh.  This time we'll take it slow.[/tab]
